03 Background

EXP & STUDIES

Experience
Mar–Dec 2022
Graphic Designer
NIAR — Wichita, Kansas
Created visually appealing promotional materials to communicate event details and attract target audiences. Developed a unique typeface tailored to the ATLAS brand identity. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure brand consistency. Led design for NASA Space Apps Wichita — t-shirts, backdrops, flex prints — and managed full program logistics.
NASA Space Apps · Lead Design
2016–2021
Board Member
Youth of Shangri-La — Putalisadak, Nepal
Facilitated blood donation drives and organised a UNESCO panel discussion on SDG Goal 4: Quality Education. Led a 13-week cleanliness campaign across Kathmandu. Organised a charity movie premiere and built a computer lab for the Chepang indigenous community of Nepal. Monitored fundraising events run by interns across Nepali colleges.
Education
Present
Masters in Computer Science
Monroe College — New York
Pursuing an MSc in Computer Science. Passionate about UX/UI design and human-computer interaction, building on a multidisciplinary background in social work and creative production.
2016–2020
Bachelors in Social Work
St. Xavier's College — Kathmandu, Nepal
Undergraduate degree in Social Work. Built a deep understanding of people, communities, and human behaviour — a foundation that informs everything creative.
Tools & Skills
Adobe Photoshop
Adobe Illustrator
After Effects
Premiere Pro
Color Grading
Python
